text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Ah! I think... I just got a super neat idea!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you've got that crazy look in your eyes. All
right, just tell me.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: It goes like this—I'm gonna switch out all these posters on the board with big posters of me!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, then all eyes will be on the one and only
Turbo. They'll talk about how great I am!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Ohoho! I'm a genius! Come on, Nature, we gotta
make posters fast!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's put the brakes on a sec. Even if we
make your posters, the student council would be
pretty upset with us.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat? Like, they'd yell at us?! No, no! No, no,
no!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Now let's settle down and get back
to reality—

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: I got it! We'll make a whole other board to put next to here—one just for me! A huge one! We just need a ton of wood from the field. Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Umm, I really do love that can-do attitude, you
know. But let me try to explain some more.
